context.projectOverview: agent-bober: brownfield TypeScript/Node multi-mode software engineering teammate. Pipeline = bober-planner → bober-curator → bober-generator → bober-evaluator, orchestrated via Claude Code Agent tool. Artifacts under .bober/ (specs, contracts, briefings, handoffs, eval-results, history.jsonl, progress.md). Sprint 4 starts Tier 1 (quality discipline) after Tier 0 (sprints 1-3) completed first iteration each.

completedSprints.title: SessionStart bootstrap + bober.using-bober skill
completedSprints.summary: Added hooks/session-start, SessionStart matcher in hooks/hooks.json, skills/bober.using-bober/SKILL.md

completedSprints.title: Verbatim port bober.verify + bober.debug skills + generator self-verify Iron Law
completedSprints.summary: skills/bober.verify/ + skills/bober.debug/ ported verbatim with attribution; agents/bober-generator.md got DISPUTE protocol + 5 Forbidden Responses + Iron Law

completedSprints.title: Voice pass across remaining agent prompts
completedSprints.summary: Iron Law + Red Flags (>=8) + Rationalization-Prevention table (>=7 rows) added to 5 agent prompts (planner/curator/evaluator/researcher/architect)

notes: Full SprintContract lives at .bober/contracts/sprint-spec-20260524-bober-vision-4.json. Sprint Briefing (READ FIRST) at .bober/briefings/sprint-spec-20260524-bober-vision-4-briefing.md.
